items.title: CIO Notebook: August Core CPI As Expected But Claims Steal The Spotlight
items.description: We continue to believe that volatility creates opportunities to align portfolios with long-term strategic asset allocations and emphasize putting cash to work as yields move lower.

items.title: Global Monetary Base - Update Through August 2025 And 2025 Forecast
items.description: In August, Global Monetary Base fell by 0.4% MoM and has fallen by $194 billion, or 0.8%, over the last twelve months. Read more here.
